mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WEBAUTHN_CREDENTIAL ( credential_id, member_id, public_key_cose, sign_count, aaguid, created_at ) VALUES ( #{credentialId}, #{memberId}, #{publicKeyCose, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{signCount}, #{aaguid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT credential_id, member_id, public_key_cose, sign_count, aaguid, created_at FROM WEBAUTHN_CREDENTIAL WHERE credential_id = #{credentialId}
